overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a dark, atmospheric forest at night. The character travels along a winding dirt path that transitions from dense woodland to an open moorland with stone ruins, passing wooden gallows with hanging bodies as he approaches a fortified wooden bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense dark forest trail with scattered wooden posts

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the narrow forest path with swords strapped to his back, surrounded by dense trees

entered.detail: tall leafless trees forming a dense canopy overhead
narrow winding dirt trail through the forest
weathered wooden posts and fences along the path edge
tall grass and low vegetation lining both sides of the trail

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a densely wooded forest at night, with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt path. Tall dead trees create a canopy overhead, blocking most of the sky, while grass and undergrowth line the trail. Wooden posts occasionally appear along the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open moorland with distant stone ruins and full moon

events.description: full moon becomes visible through the thinning trees, casting pale light across the landscape
forest opens up to reveal large stone tower ruins in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path toward the distant stone ruins, now visible against the night sky

entered.detail: tall crumbling stone towers silhouetted against the night sky
large bright full moon illuminating the scene from above the ruins
sections of worn cobblestone emerging from the dirt trail

segments.scene_description: The forest opens up into a wide moorland as the full moon becomes visible, illuminating the stone tower ruins in the distance. The path transitions from dirt to mixed cobblestone sections. The wooden posts recede into the background as the landscape becomes more open and exposed.

events.description: passing multiple wooden gallows with hanging bodies lining both sides of the path
approaching the wooden fortified bridge entrance with stone walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily past the ominous gallows toward the fortified wooden bridge entrance

entered.detail: tall wooden gallows structures with hanging corpses lining the path
large wooden fortification with bridge structure blocking the path ahead
crumbling stone walls adjacent to the wooden fortification

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the cobblestone path as it passes ominous wooden gallows with hanging bodies on the right side. The stone tower ruins and moon disappear from view as Geralt approaches a large wooden fortified bridge entrance. The atmosphere becomes more foreboding with the appearance of the execution structures and the dark fortification ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic nocturnal forest that gradually opens into a desolate moorland before arriving at a fortified outpost. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt path beneath a dense canopy of dead trees and thick undergrowth. As the woodland thins, the scene expands into a wide moorland where the full moon emerges to illuminate distant stone tower ruins and the path shifts toward mixed cobblestone. The camera then follows this trail past ominous wooden gallows with hanging bodies, causing the moon and ruins to vanish from view. Finally, the atmosphere grows more foreboding as the path leads directly toward the entrance of a large, fortified wooden bridge.
